disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Cough onset began within weeks of starting a new antihypertensive medication (perindopril)
trigger_question_examples: Have you started any new medications recently, around the time the cough began?
Are you on any regular medications, especially anything new in the last month or two?
Did the cough start around the same time as any change to your tablets?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: Actually yes — I started a new blood pressure tablet, perindopril, about four weeks ago. I didn't think to connect the two.
disclosure_items.patient_deflection_template: No new medications that I can think of.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: No shortness of breath at rest, no chest pain, no fever
trigger_question_examples: Are you short of breath at rest, or only with the coughing?
Any chest pain or tightness, or fevers/chills?
Do you feel breathless just sitting still, separate from the coughing fits?
Any fever or feeling generally unwell with this?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No, I'm not short of breath when I'm just sitting still — it's really only the coughing itself that's the problem. No chest pain and no fever either.
disclosure_items.patient_deflection_template: I haven't really checked, I've just been focused on the cough.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: No blood in sputum (cough is dry, no sputum at all)
trigger_question_examples: Have you coughed up any blood or noticed blood-streaked mucus?
Is there any phlegm at all, and if so, what colour?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No blood at all, no. It's completely dry — nothing comes up, not even normal phlegm.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: No ankle swelling and no known history of heart failure
trigger_question_examples: Have you noticed any swelling in your ankles or legs?
Any history of heart problems or heart failure?
Have you gained weight recently or noticed puffiness anywhere?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No swelling in my legs or ankles that I've noticed, and no, I've never been told I have any heart problems.
disclosure_items.patient_deflection_template: Not sure, I haven't really checked.

patient_initiated_exchanges.patient_text: Should I just stop taking the blood pressure tablet myself tonight so I can finally get some sleep?
patient_initiated_exchanges.expected_ai_doctor_response_quality: Acknowledge the likely link to the medication and the patient's exhaustion, but advise the patient not to simply self-stop a prescribed antihypertensive without arranging a switch to an alternative agent with their prescriber, and to seek review within an appropriately short timeframe rather than emergency care. Should not tell the patient to just stop it with no follow-up plan, and should not dismiss the request either.
